channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Blocked drain, opp 8 Greenway Ln, 7th May
item.description:
Blocked drain, opp 8 Greenway Ln

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Greenway Lane, Battledown, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old chair and other bits of furniture left by the pavement, 7th May
item.description:
Old chair and other bits of furniture left by the pavement for days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: A number of pot holes along HillFields, 7th May
item.description:
As you enter Hillfields on the left hand side is a number of pot holes, I have a client who is visually impaired with only light and dark who has tripped and fallen. He walks this road as there is no footpath to follow and the pot holes are dangerous when using his Long Cane. I write on his behalf from Guide Dogs association for the blind
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Hillfield, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stile missing step caused me to fall also extensive wear on path leading to flooding then path is impassabl, 7th May
item.description:
The stile and footpath coming off watermead at the westerly, green street end of the footpath leading up Castle Hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Audi Car, 7th May
item.description:
Hi. I pick up a pupil for driving lessons from this road and for last couple of weeks this car has been on the corner and not moved. Pupil doesn't know if it belongs to any home owners. It it has damaged to front

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingstone Avenue, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not been cut, 7th May
item.description:
The last 3 times this area of grass outside 118 and 120 meadoway hasn’t been cut but all the rest has Is there some sort of problem to why it hasn’t been done ? I’d do it myself but do not own a mower

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadoway, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on side of road, 7th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold

item.title: Road is chewed up, 4 potholes at least, 7th May
item.description:
Halfway in between Little Colesbourne House and Staple Farm, in a dip hard to miss
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many very bad potholes covering a mini roundabout by the Community Centre. It causes huge damage to cars and bikes, where the bump has been repaired incredibly badly previously, and needs to be completely resurfaced., 7th May
item.description:
Covering the entire mini roundabout by the Community Centre in Churchdown, Parton Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
